title: The Other Place
description: A place between life and death.
body:
"_A simple mod for when you want to add something, but nothing at the same time._" Me, 2024

  This mod adds a brand new demension,"Purgatory". This demension is only accessable through the death of a player. After Dying, you will be respawned in Purgatory. This dimension is nothing but a barren land, where no mob can spawn, only find themselves trapped in. 
  
  The only was to escape purgatory is the find "**Time Liquid**". Time Liquid makes up the oceans of Purgatory. Simply taking the plunge will transport you back to the overworld.

  



  _Mod Made using MCreator_
  
  Use the mod for whaterver and whenever, all i ask is to credited.
